channel.title: Franklin Peñaranda | coffemanfp
channel.description: Recent content on Franklin Peñaranda | coffemanfp

item.title: Download original template
item.description: A simple, nice-looking call to action box. Boxing is about respect. getting it for yourself, and taking it away from the other guy. no, this is mount everest.

item.title: About me
item.description: Make the world a better place, being better individually, making that trying to improve the world is not the cause, but the effect caused by your personal improvement. Es la frase que mas me ha ayudado a mantenerme en el ritmo de mi constante crecimiento y ayudar a la sociedad. History Start I started in software development when I was about 15 years old. A talented friend Arturo Nava supported me in my growth with his tutoring and advice; he taught me what I needed about programming languages, relational databases, how a computer works, its components, etc… The most important thing he taught me was to learn in an autonomous way, not depending on any institution to be able to do what I wanted to do.

item.title: YoFio
item.description: YoFio is a financial start-up that provides users with credit lines based on their credit history to help them with their financial issues. Since I started the idea of my entry was to migrate the logic of a credit to a line of credit. With no financial knowledge, I had to learn everything about how a finance company, a line of credit and the business logic itself worked in order to create the most appropriate use cases.

item.title: Chat
item.description: Chat is literally another fucking chat. It is a personal project that I created to create my own challenges, define my knowledge and learn new technologies. The goal is that it works as an individual platform and that it can also be part of other projects created by myself that will form a mini social network. This is the beginning of a great project that will define my professional career.

item.title: Fyld Inc
item.description: Fyld Inc. is a start-up that aims to provide its users with a mail witnessing service. My entry as a Full-Stack developer started with a turnaround in the whole code architecture. I developed the migration from a monolithic architecture to a microservices architecture. Being a mail witnessing service, the priority is to back up the information sent in the mails of the sending users. It works in such a way that a sender user sends an email to the original recipients and additionally adds Fyld among its recipients.

item.title: Tenla City
item.description: Tenla City is an E-Commerce platform that facilitates the purchase and sale of products to customers and sellers. With its developed management of promotions, coupons and discounts, it keeps users interested in the most popular stores in the city. Users also have the facility to create a meeting point to meet other users in the store they are in. Tenla City is a project for the city of Maracaibo, Zulia, Venezuela.

item.title: Database managment
item.description: I know very well the handling of relational database managers. I am quite familiar with PostgreSQL or SQLite3.

item.title: Back-End Development
item.description: My main field of strength is Back-End development. With technologies like Go, PostgreSQL and Linux, I can feel completely fluent when coding.
Make the world a better place, being better individually, making that trying to improve the world is not the cause, but the effect caused by your personal improvement.

item.title: Download HUGO template
item.description: Another simple, nice-looking call to action box. Boxing is about respect. getting it for yourself, and taking it away from the other guy. no, this is mount everest.

item.title: Front-End Development
item.description: Although Front-End is not my specialty, I do not rule out any possibility of working on it.
